header.title: V01 — A Single Room
header.author: Sharpee Tutorial
header.description: Verify the Zoo Entrance room exists, scenery is examineable but unliftable, the player has a working inventory, and a roomless world refuses navigation gracefully.

comment.text: V1 teaches: look + examine + scenery + player setup + empty-exits room
The game starts at the Zoo Entrance
Scenery has descriptions
Aliases on IdentityTrait are real, not decoration
(the welcome sign declares aliases: ['sign', 'welcome sign', 'wooden sign'])
SceneryTrait applies per-entity — both pieces of scenery must reject 'take'
Player has ContainerTrait and starts empty
RoomTrait with no exits refuses movement gracefully
Looking again confirms room stability
=== Currently FAILING — these assertions encode the v01 doc's promises    ===
=== but hit upstream bugs in @sharpee/sharpee@0.9.113. They turn red in   ===
=== the test viewer until upstream fixes land, then go green as regression ===
=== protection. See ChicagoDave/sharpee#107 + #108.                        ===
Player aliases (declared as ['self', 'myself', 'me']) — should resolve to
the player's IdentityTrait description. Currently fails: "you can't see any
such thing." Will go green when actor-alias resolution is fixed.
Room aliases (declared as ['entrance', 'gates', 'gate']) — should resolve to
the room's IdentityTrait description. Currently fails for the same reason.
Silent turn — the inserting action emits a messageId
(if.action.inserting.fixed_in_place) that has no template registered, so
the player sees nothing. Tracked as #107. Will go green once the helper's
error key is namespaced and a template lands.

comments: V1 teaches: look + examine + scenery + player setup + empty-exits room
The game starts at the Zoo Entrance
Scenery has descriptions
Aliases on IdentityTrait are real, not decoration
(the welcome sign declares aliases: ['sign', 'welcome sign', 'wooden sign'])
SceneryTrait applies per-entity — both pieces of scenery must reject 'take'
Player has ContainerTrait and starts empty
RoomTrait with no exits refuses movement gracefully
Looking again confirms room stability
=== Currently FAILING — these assertions encode the v01 doc's promises    ===
=== but hit upstream bugs in @sharpee/sharpee@0.9.113. They turn red in   ===
=== the test viewer until upstream fixes land, then go green as regression ===
=== protection. See ChicagoDave/sharpee#107 + #108.                        ===
Player aliases (declared as ['self', 'myself', 'me']) — should resolve to
the player's IdentityTrait description. Currently fails: "you can't see any
such thing." Will go green when actor-alias resolution is fixed.
Room aliases (declared as ['entrance', 'gates', 'gate']) — should resolve to
the room's IdentityTrait description. Currently fails for the same reason.
Silent turn — the inserting action emits a messageId
(if.action.inserting.fixed_in_place) that has no template registered, so
the player sees nothing. Tracked as #107. Will go green once the helper's
error key is namespaced and a template lands.

commands.actualOutput:
Family Zoo
By Sharpee Tutorial

Type HELP for instructions.

Zoo Entrance

You stand before the gates of the Willowbrook Family Zoo. A cheerful welcome sign arches over the entrance, and a small ticket booth sits to one side. Beyond the gates, you can hear the distant calls of exotic birds and the chatter of monkeys. [Built for @sharpee/sharpee v0.9.113]

You can see welcome sign, ticket booth here.

>

room.name: Zoo Entrance
room.description: You stand before the gates of the Willowbrook Family Zoo. A cheerful welcome sign arches over the entrance, and a small ticket booth sits to one side. Beyond the gates, you can hear the distant calls of exotic birds and the chatter of monkeys. [Built for @sharpee/sharpee v0.9.113]

visibleItems.name: welcome sign
visibleItems.description: A brightly painted wooden sign reads: "WELCOME TO WILLOWBROOK FAMILY ZOO — Home to over 50 amazing animals! Open daily, rain or shine." Cartoon animals dance along the border.

visibleItems.name: ticket booth
visibleItems.description: A small wooden booth with a sliding glass window. A sign in the window reads "Self-Guided Tours — No Ticket Needed Today!" A friendly cartoon giraffe is painted on the side.

Beyond the gates, you can hear the distant calls of exotic birds and the chatter of monkeys. [Built for @sharpee/sharpee v0.9.113]
